name: ListFileSystemAssociationsOutput
description: ListFileSystemAssociationsOutput schema from Amazon Storage Gateway API

allOf.description: If the request includes Marker, the response returns that value in this field.
If a value is present, there are more file system associations to return. In a subsequent request, use NextMarker as the value for Marker to retrieve the next set of file system associations.
An array of information about the Amazon FSx gateway's file system associations.
